mapper.sql: c.id AS id, c.post_id AS post_id, c.parent_comment_id AS parent_comment_id, CASE WHEN c.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE c.body END AS body, u.id AS author_id, u.display_name AS author_display_name, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url, c.created_at AS created_at, c.updated_at AS updated_at, (c.user_id = #{currentUserId}) AS is_mine, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM follows f WHERE f.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND f.followee_id = c.user_id) AS is_following, (c.deleted_at IS NOT NULL) AS is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND (c.deleted_at IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM comments child WHERE child.parent_comment_id = c.id)) ORDER BY c.id ASC
SELECT FROM comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.id = #{commentId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, parent_comment_id, body) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{body})
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET body = #{body}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comments SET deleted_at = now() WHERE id = #{commentId}
